content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Book of Evil". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/337/problem/D
constraints: 1 <= number of words on each page <= 1000
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the number of pages in the book. The next line contains n integers, which are the number of words on each page.
content.outputFormat: The minimum number of pages that need to be turned to read the book from cover to cover.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use dynamic programming to calculate the minimum number of pages that need to be turned.
